title: CT12 automation-first Lean tactic
description: The complete compiled graph, general capability API, specialized capability profiles, node automation contracts, and semantic residual inventory for this tactic.

transitions.constructorType:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {capability : CT12.Capability P} → CT12.Graph.Edge capability CT12.Graph.NodeId.entry CT12.Graph.NodeId.saturation

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {capability : CT12.Capability P} →
    capability.State 0 → CT12.Graph.Edge capability CT12.Graph.NodeId.saturation CT12.Graph.NodeId.exhaustedTerminal

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {capability : CT12.Capability P} →
    {n : ℕ} → capability.State (n + 1) → CT12.Graph.Edge capability CT12.Graph.NodeId.saturation CT12.Graph.NodeId.peel

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {capability : CT12.Capability P} →
    {n : ℕ} →
      {state : capability.State (n + 1)} →
        capability.Peeled state → CT12.Graph.Edge capability CT12.Graph.NodeId.peel CT12.Graph.NodeId.restoration

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {capability : CT12.Capability P} →
    {n : ℕ} →
      {state : capability.State (n + 1)} →
        capability.Peeled state →
          capability.DemandResidual →
            CT12.Graph.Edge capability CT12.Graph.NodeId.restoration CT12.Graph.NodeId.demandTerminal

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {capability : CT12.Capability P} →
    {n : ℕ} →
      {state : capability.State (n + 1)} →
        capability.Peeled state →
          capability.TierResidual →
            CT12.Graph.Edge capability CT12.Graph.NodeId.restoration CT12.Graph.NodeId.tierTerminal

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {capability : CT12.Capability P} →
    {n next : ℕ} →
      {state : capability.State (n + 1)} →
        capability.Peeled state →
          capability.State next →
            next < n + 1 → CT12.Graph.Edge capability CT12.Graph.NodeId.restoration CT12.Graph.NodeId.decrease

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {capability : CT12.Capability P} →
    {n next : ℕ} →
      {state : capability.State (n + 1)} →
        capability.Peeled state →
          capability.State next →
            next < n + 1 → CT12.Graph.Edge capability CT12.Graph.NodeId.decrease CT12.Graph.NodeId.saturation

loopDecrease.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (capability : CT12.Capability P)
  (edge : CT12.Graph.Edge capability CT12.Graph.NodeId.decrease CT12.Graph.NodeId.saturation), ∃ load next, next < load
loopDecrease.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT12.Graph.Edge.loopBack_decreases

presentation.plainExplanation: The type of loop states indexed by their well-founded natural load n.
presentation.label: Load-indexed state

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → CT12.Capability P → ℕ → Type uState
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT12.Capability.State

presentation.plainExplanation: The type of semantic demand failures that may terminate peeling.
presentation.label: Demand residual

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → CT12.Capability P → Type uDemand
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT12.Capability.DemandResidual

presentation.plainExplanation: The type of semantic tier failures that may terminate peeling.
presentation.label: Tier residual

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → CT12.Capability P → Type uTier
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT12.Capability.TierResidual

presentation.plainExplanation: The dependent type of exact structural decompositions of a positive-load state.
presentation.label: Peeling result

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → (self : CT12.Capability P) → {n : ℕ} → self.State (n + 1) → Type uPeeled
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT12.Capability.Peeled

presentation.plainExplanation: Computes the exact peeled decomposition of a positive-load state.
presentation.label: Peeling operation

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → (self : CT12.Capability P) → {n : ℕ} → (state : self.State (n + 1)) → self.Peeled state
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT12.Capability.peel

presentation.plainExplanation: Produces nonempty finite choices: a strictly smaller continuation or a demand/tier residual.
presentation.label: Restoration options

formalDeclaration.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (self : CT12.Capability P) →
    {n : ℕ} →
      {state : self.State (n + 1)} →
        self.Peeled state → CT12.RestorationOptions self.State self.DemandResidual self.TierResidual (n + 1)
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT12.Capability.restorations

presentation.plainExplanation: The sole authored type in the canonical profile that repeatedly removes a list head.
presentation.label: List element

formalDeclaration.type: CT12.ListPeeling.Profile → Type uValue
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT12.ListPeeling.Profile.Value

presentation.plainExplanation: The exact finite host-vertex schedule used to bound the selected packing.
presentation.label: Host vertices

formalDeclaration.type: {Vertex : Type uVertex} → {Item : Type uItem} → Core.FiniteDisjointPacking.Profile Vertex Item → FinEnum Vertex
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteDisjointPacking.Profile.vertices

presentation.plainExplanation: Finiteness used only to prove existence of a maximum disjoint family.
presentation.label: Finite item family

formalDeclaration.type: ∀ {Vertex : Type uVertex} {Item : Type uItem} (self : Core.FiniteDisjointPacking.Profile Vertex Item), Finite Item
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteDisjointPacking.Profile.finiteItems

presentation.plainExplanation: The finite host-vertex support occupied by one packing item.
presentation.label: Item support

formalDeclaration.type: {Vertex : Type uVertex} → {Item : Type uItem} → Core.FiniteDisjointPacking.Profile Vertex Item → Item → Finset Vertex
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteDisjointPacking.Profile.support

presentation.plainExplanation: One host vertex chosen from each support for the linear packing bound.
presentation.label: Support representative

formalDeclaration.type: {Vertex : Type uVertex} → {Item : Type uItem} → Core.FiniteDisjointPacking.Profile Vertex Item → Item → Vertex
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteDisjointPacking.Profile.representative

presentation.plainExplanation: Proof that every item support is nonempty at its declared representative.
presentation.label: Representative membership

formalDeclaration.type:
∀ {Vertex : Type uVertex} {Item : Type uItem} (self : Core.FiniteDisjointPacking.Profile Vertex Item) (item : Item),
  self.representative item ∈ self.support item
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteDisjointPacking.Profile.representative_mem

apiDeclarations.type: Type
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT12.Graph.NodeId

apiDeclarations.type: CT12.Graph.NodeId → String
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT12.Graph.NodeId.code

apiDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  CT12.Capability P → CT12.Graph.NodeId → CT12.Graph.NodeId → Type (max (max (max uDemand uPeeled) uState) uTier)
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT12.Graph.Edge

apiDeclarations.type: Type
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT12.Graph.Terminal

apiDeclarations.type: CT12.Graph.Terminal → CT12.Graph.NodeId
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT12.Graph.Terminal.nodeId

apiDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  CT12.Capability P → CT12.Graph.NodeId → CT12.Graph.NodeId → Type (max (max (max uDemand uPeeled) uState) uTier)
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT12.Graph.Path

apiDeclarations.type: {P : Core.Problem} → CT12.Capability P → List CT12.Graph.NodeId → Prop
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT12.Graph.ValidTrace

apiDeclarations.type: Core.Problem → Type (max (max (max (uDemand + 1) (uPeeled + 1)) (uState + 1)) (uTier + 1))
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT12.Capability

apiDeclarations.type: {P : Core.Problem} → CT12.Capability P → Type (max (max uAmbient uBranch) uState)
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT12.Input

apiDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (capability : CT12.Capability P) → CT12.Input capability → Type (max (max (max uDemand uPeeled) uState) uTier)
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT12.ExecutionResult

apiDeclarations.type: {P : Core.Problem} → CT12.Capability P → CT12.Graph.Terminal → Type (max (max uDemand uState) uTier)
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT12.Outcome

apiDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (capability : CT12.Capability P) → (input : CT12.Input capability) → CT12.ExecutionResult capability input
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT12.run

apiDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (capability : CT12.Capability P) → (input : CT12.Input capability) → CT12.ExecutionResult capability input
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT12.runReference

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (capability : CT12.Capability P) (input : CT12.Input capability),
  CT12.Outcome.Valid capability (CT12.run capability input).outcome
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT12.run_verified

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (capability : CT12.Capability P) (input : CT12.Input capability),
  CT12.Graph.ValidTrace capability (CT12.ExecutionResult.trace capability (CT12.run capability input))
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT12.run_trace_valid

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (capability : CT12.Capability P) (input : CT12.Input capability),
  ∃ r,
    CT12.Outcome.Valid capability r.outcome ∧
      CT12.Graph.ValidTrace capability (CT12.ExecutionResult.trace capability r) ∧
        r.iterations ≤ input.load ∧ (CT12.ExecutionResult.trace capability r).length ≤ 4 * input.load + 3
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT12.run_total

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (capability : CT12.Capability P) {input : CT12.Input capability}
  (l r : CT12.ExecutionResult capability input), l = CT12.run capability input → r = CT12.run capability input → l = r
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT12.run_deterministic

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (capability : CT12.Capability P) {input : CT12.Input capability}
  (result : CT12.ExecutionResult capability input),
  result.terminal = CT12.Graph.Terminal.exhausted ∨
    result.terminal = CT12.Graph.Terminal.demand ∨ result.terminal = CT12.Graph.Terminal.tier
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT12.outcome_exhaustive

apiDeclarations.type: Core.CapabilityContract
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT12.capabilityContract

apiDeclarations.type: List Core.NodeAutomationContract
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT12.nodeAutomationContracts

apiDeclarations.type: List Core.ResidualKindContract
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT12.residualKindContracts
